name: llm_core
summary: Provider-neutral LLM contracts for workspace libraries and plugins.
documentation:
Provider-neutral LLM contracts for workspace libraries and plugins.

## API Reference

### LLMProvider
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class LLMProvider(ABC)

Synchronous provider interface used by workspace agents.

### LLMRequest
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class LLMRequest

Provider-neutral synchronous completion request.

### LLMResponse
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class LLMResponse

Provider-neutral completion response.

### Message
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class Message

One normalized conversation message.

### ToolDefinition
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class ToolDefinition

Provider-neutral model tool definition.

### ToolCall
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class ToolCall

One tool invocation requested by a model.

### Usage
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class Usage

Normalized token usage reported by a provider.

### LLMError
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class LLMError(RuntimeError)

Base error raised by workspace LLM providers.

### LLMConfigurationError
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class LLMConfigurationError(LLMError)

Raised when a provider is missing required configuration.

### LLMProviderError
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class LLMProviderError(LLMError)

Raised when a provider request fails or returns an invalid response.

### value
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: value(source: Any, name: str, default: Any = None) -> Any

Read a field from either a mapping or an SDK response object.
